name: @workspace/product-os-studio
description: Launcher artifact only. Contains NO application code. It builds and serves the standalone app in apps/product-os-studio at the /studio preview path. Delete this directory to fully de-register the preview without affecting apps/product-os-studio.

scripts.dev: cd ../../apps/product-os-studio && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.build: cd ../../apps/product-os-studio && npm ci && npm run build
